full_text:
Yan Ze 嚴澤
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Ze (嚴澤). Governed Lucheng, surrendered to Zhuge Liang in 231. Yan Ze is a fictional character. Yan Ze was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
